name: APA Corporation
description: APA Corporation is an independent energy company that explores for, develops, and produces natural gas, crude oil, and natural gas liquids. The company has operations in the United States, Egypt, and the United Kingdom, and exploration activities offshore Suriname. Founded in 1954 as Apache Corporation, the company reorganized in 2021 under a holding company structure as APA Corporation, continuing its long-standing commitment to meeting global energy needs while focusing on safety, environmental responsibility, and community partnership.
